title: Instagram Deep Investigation (Advanced Self-Serve Beta) Input

username.title: Target username
username.description: Instagram username to investigate. This can be any target username, not necessarily one of your operator accounts. Operator accounts are execution resources only.

runMode.title: Run mode
runMode.description: Backfill runs aim for deeper first-pass discovery. Freshness runs are lighter revisits that reuse prior runtime memory and previously productive branches.

maxDiscoveryCycles.title: Max discovery cycles
maxDiscoveryCycles.description: How many internal discovery/scan cycles the Actor should attempt before stopping. Higher values increase recall effort, runtime, and operator-resource usage.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Required for operator-backed deep investigations. Configure Apify Proxy or your own proxies so operator sessions can bootstrap and reuse sticky, anti-blocking network identity.

operatorAccounts.title: Operator accounts
operatorAccounts.description: Legitimate Instagram accounts you provide for session-aware deep discovery. These accounts are not the target; they are execution resources used to inspect session-visible graph surfaces and bootstrap reusable sessions.

username.title: Operator username
username.description: Instagram username of the legitimate operator account used as an execution resource.

password.title: Operator password
password.description: Password for the operator account so the Actor can bootstrap and persist a reusable session.

sessionKey.title: Sticky session key
sessionKey.description: Optional stable session key used to tie the operator account to a persistent proxy/session identity.

graphExpansion.title: Graph expansion settings
graphExpansion.description: Controls how aggressively the Actor expands root graph discovery through bio-linked accounts, followers, following, and the resulting profile expansions.

maxFollowersToInspect.title: Max followers to inspect
maxFollowersToInspect.description: How many follower usernames the Actor should try to collect from the target's root graph during session-aware expansion.

maxFollowingToInspect.title: Max following to inspect
maxFollowingToInspect.description: How many following usernames the Actor should try to collect from the target's root graph during session-aware expansion.

maxExpandedProfiles.title: Max expanded profiles
maxExpandedProfiles.description: Maximum number of root graph usernames that should be turned into expanded profile discovery during a single run.
